prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: MCN-GAAACCRA-3PC-SML-CLR-1 Product Type: OUTDOOR_RECREATION_PRODUCT Brand (from catalog): GEAR AID Existing Title: Aquaseal and Cotol-240 Combo Repair Adhesive Glue Description: Aquaseal repairs all types of wader fabrics and materials including GORE-TEX fabric waders and other waterproof breathable fabrics – as well as neoprene waders and all types of fishing footwear. Provides superior adhesion, wear resistance, flexibility and waterproofing. Highly concentrated formula provides thick repairs and minimal adhesive shrinkage with only one permanent application. For fast cure, use with Cotol-240 Cure Accelerator. Made in U.S.A.

Aquaseal is made to fix just about anything. With it you can make permanent repairs to tears, holes and rips in GORE-TEX fabric and all other wader material. Its super-strong formula waterproofs, seals, bonds and repairs your most important gear. Aquaseal is part of a comprehensive line of Care and Repair products from Gear Aid. With Gear Aid, anyone can be a master of gear repair. Works on all wader fabrics and materials, plus felt soles, float tubes, and pontoon boats. Search Terms: repair adhesive aquaseal seam sealant cotol-240 sealant fabric repair gear maintenance Features: - Dries to Clear - Permanently Seals, Bonds, and Repairs - 2 Hour Dry Time with Cotol-240 - Superior Adhesion and Waterproofing - Aquaseal Size: 3/4 oz | Cotol-240 Size: 1/2 oz === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
